In Python, the equivalent exception to Java's `NumberFormatException` is `ValueError`. This exception is raised when an operation or function receives an argument of the right type but inappropriate value. In the context of converting a string to an integer, `ValueError` is raised if the string does not contain a valid integer.

 represents a group of objects, known as its elements.  Some
